% Two-column for everything. Same as aic2026/pdf: longtable -> scriptsize
% tabular in center; toprule/midrule/bottomrule swallow \noalign{} and become \hline.
% Allow embedding PDFs up to 1.7 (e.g. from rsvg-convert/Inkscape) without warning.
\pdfminorversion=7
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{epstopdf}
\usepackage{float}
\renewenvironment{longtable}{\begin{center}\scriptsize\begin{tabular}}{\end{tabular}\end{center}}
\renewcommand{\endhead}{}
\renewcommand{\endfirsthead}{}
\def\endlastfoot{\hspace{0mm}}
\renewcommand{\toprule}[2]{\hline}
\renewcommand{\midrule}[2]{\hline}
\renewcommand{\bottomrule}[2]{\hline}

% Allow underscore _ in text (e.g. V_CTAT) so it does not trigger math mode
\IfFileExists{underscore.sty}{\usepackage{underscore}}{}
